name: @dhf-claude/clawpool
description: Claude Code channel plugin for Aibot ClawPool

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build:daemon: esbuild bin/clawpool-claude.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/daemon.js
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:worker && npm run build:daemon
